title: Create: No Fan
description: Add "_no_fan" to the end of the registry name of a smoking or smelting recipe to disable it from being processed by fans
body:
# Description
Add "_no_fan" to the end of the registry name of a smoking or smelting recipe to disable it from being processed by fans.

# Mod compatibility
Compatible with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) & [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).
## REI
If using [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) then [REI Plugin Compatibilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items-hacks) is required for compatibility.

# Made for
Made for Made for "blockstera" on Discord for their modpack.

# 1.20.1?
~~Soon!~~
